'''Bright Eye''' was a [[Brown folk|brown]] [[Kentra]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was [[Ironclaw]]'s nephew, and, while not as experienced as Ironclaw, he had an incredible ability to acquire new skills very fast. He assisted Ironclaw in bringing a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives to [[Kariish]] to see [[King/Legends|King]] [[Jerius]].<ref name="TP">{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}</ref>
